fields.summary: Separate TaskRunner for AM and NM tasks in SLS.

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description: NM simulator and AM simulator uses the same TaskRunner Pool currently. Defining separate pools for AM and NM will improve the run times.
